text.title: inc-runbook-as-markdown-tagged-steps Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for inc-runbook-as-markdown-tagged-steps as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding an implicit "if untagged, treat as auto" default.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defaults turn forgotten tags into silent escalations of agent privilege; the next contributor will write a destructive untagged step and the agent will run it.

failure-mode.description: Falling back to a "default runbook" when the lookup misses.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A default runbook for arbitrary alerts cannot encode service-specific safety; "restart the service" applied to a stateful primary is a data-loss event.
